Medically Supervised Programs

Medical Weight Loss

Physician-supervised weight loss programs featuring FDA-approved GLP-1 medications like semaglutide and tirzepatide, combined with nutritional coaching and lifestyle support for sustainable results.

Start Your Journey Learn More

Understanding Our Program

Physician-Supervised Weight Management

Our medical weight loss program goes beyond diet and exercise. We utilize FDA-approved GLP-1 receptor agonist medications—semaglutide and tirzepatide—that work by mimicking hormones that regulate appetite, slow gastric emptying, and improve insulin sensitivity. Combined with personalized nutritional guidance, behavioral health support, and regular medical monitoring, our program delivers sustainable, medically-backed results.

  • FDA-approved GLP-1 medications
  • Personalized nutrition and lifestyle plans
  • Monthly follow-ups with dose optimization
  • Nutritional and lifestyle coaching for sustainable habits
  • Behavioral health support for stress and emotional eating
  • Community and peer support for motivation

20%

Avg. Weight Loss

How It Works

The Science Behind GLP-1 Medications

Mimicking Natural Hormones

These medications mimic GLP-1, a hormone that regulates appetite and food intake by enhancing feelings of fullness and satisfaction.

Slowing Digestion

They slow down gastric emptying, extending the feeling of fullness after meals, thus reducing overall calorie intake.

Improving Insulin Sensitivity

They enhance your body's response to insulin, supporting metabolic health and reducing the risk of type 2 diabetes.

Clinical Evidence

Clinical trials demonstrate their effectiveness in promoting significant weight loss and improving overall quality of life.

Your Journey

What to Expect

01

Initial Consultation

Start with an in-person or telemedicine consultation to determine your weight loss goals. If you are in-network with one of our many insurance providers, this visit may be covered by insurance!

02

Comprehensive Blood Tests

Book an appointment with LabCorp or Quest to receive your comprehensive blood tests to ensure the safest and most effective treatment plan.

03

Begin Treatment

Come in the office at our Newport Beach location, or receive a prescription for at-home injections! Meet monthly to determine if dose adjustments are necessary.

04

Ongoing Support

Monthly follow-up visits to monitor progress, adjust dosages, address side effects, and provide nutritional and behavioral coaching.

Why Choose GLP-1 Therapy

Benefits of Semaglutide and Tirzepatide

FDA-Approved Weight Loss

Clinical trials have demonstrated that people lost an average of 15% of their body weight on semaglutide, and an average of 20% when taking tirzepatide.

Reduces Food Cravings

Works by activating certain areas in the brain that control appetite and food cravings.

Convenient to Use

A once-weekly weight-loss injection that can be comfortably self-administered at home.

Improves Metabolic Health

Reduces blood sugar levels, lowers blood pressure, and decreases cholesterol and triglyceride levels.

Beyond Weight Loss

Comprehensive Health Benefits

Cardiovascular Health

Reduces major adverse cardiovascular events including heart attacks and strokes.

Blood Sugar Control

Improves insulin sensitivity and helps regulate blood sugar levels.

Blood Pressure

Clinically shown to lower blood pressure and reduce hypertension risk.

Sleep Quality

Reduced obesity improves sleep apnea and overall sleep quality.

Mental Wellness

Weight loss has been shown to improve mood, self-esteem, and reduce symptoms of depression.

Reduced Complications

Lowers risk of obesity-related complications including chronic pain, joint issues, and metabolic syndrome.

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

We offer FDA-approved GLP-1 receptor agonists including semaglutide (the active ingredient in Ozempic/Wegovy) and tirzepatide (the active ingredient in Mounjaro/Zepbound). Your provider will recommend the best option based on your health profile and goals.
Most patients begin noticing appetite reduction within the first 1-2 weeks. Significant weight loss typically becomes apparent within the first month, with continued progress over 3-6 months as doses are optimized.
Common side effects include mild nausea, which typically decreases over time as your body adjusts. Your provider monitors you closely and adjusts dosing to minimize any discomfort.
Medical weight loss consultations may be covered by insurance. GLP-1 medications may require prior authorization or may be self-pay depending on your plan. Our team helps verify your coverage.
Yes! Both initial consultations and follow-up visits can be conducted via secure telehealth. Prescriptions can be sent directly to your pharmacy.

Have more questions? Contact our clinical team.

Ready to Transform Your Health?

Take the first step toward sustainable weight loss with physician-supervised care. Schedule your consultation today.

Schedule Your Consultation (949) 996-5355
